headline: GM unveils new Silverado amid growing pickup truck challenges
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Josh Lipton on Market Domination to break down the new (GM) Chevrolet's redesigned Silverado and examine the mounting challenges facing the pickup truck market, from shifting consumer demand to affordability concerns and increased competition.

headline: GM reveals new Silverado pickup as Ford F-150 sales falter
summary: GM revealed its next-generation 2027 Chevrolet Silverado pickup, calling it the most powerful and advanced Silverado ever — and rolling it out just as crosstown rival Ford struggles to keep its bestselling F-150 on dealer lots.

headline: Ford analyst identifies big benefits from its latest pivot
summary: For the past three and a half years, Ford Motor has traded in a very narrow range, never going much above $15 per share and never too far below $10 per share. But the debut of Ford Energy last month changed all of that, sending the stock soaring 47% in May, peaking at $17.44 to close out the month. ...
